title: APSC Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Assistant Geologist Posts
description: Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of 11 Assistant Geologist Jobs. Candidates with M.E/ M.Tech, M.Sc can use this chance and apply for the APSC Jobs 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online before the last date of application. Interested and eligible candidates can apply onli...
